description: Skye tracks Centipede’s finances to Lloyd Rathman and creates a plan to get close to him by posing as a valet and taking his car. She engineers a crash to have the car towed to Rathman’s house, then impersonates a police officer to lure him home. Using a combination of intimidation and bluffing as Agent May, Skye gains access to Rathman’s financial records, pushing him to help her dig into Centipede’s transactions and find a connection to Raina.

transcript.line: Just need an exploit... some way in.
Oh, what? Come on! Something with wireless, maybe.
Hey, Lloyd. You might be my way in.
Of course, I love truffles, but not on that. What an idiot.
No, sweetie, listen to me. It was a private jet. Of course there was wi-fi. He should've at least texted you back.
